title: Fin and airframe assembly
details: Kicked off the build by cutting the through-the-wall fin slots in the airframe, then bonded the centering rings and fins onto the inner motor tube as one assembly. Once those bonds cured, we glued the lower body tube over the inner tube, locking the fins and centering rings in place.

title: Set up the update log
details: Created updates.json to track club progress going forward.

title: Breadboard Wiring and Bench Testing
details: Wired the Arduino Nano along with the MPU9250 (accelerometer/gyroscope/magnetometer) and BME280 (pressure/altitude) sensors onto a breadboard, then ran bench tests to confirm the logger was reading and recording sensor data correctly.

title: Ground Ejection Test
details: Hand-fired a ground ejection test of the recovery system. The first attempt failed to eject the parachute because it wasn't fixed to a point on the shock cord and could slide freely along its length. We reran the test after fixing the parachute to the shock cord and the parachute ejected successfully the second time.

title: Data Logger Mount Design
details: Designed a mount for our data logger in Fusion.
